introSection: Tabalugas Achterbahn is a steel indoor roller coaster located at Plopsaland Deutschland in Hassloch, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Themed to the German media franchise Tabaluga, which park owners Studio 100 also own.

fullText:
Tabalugas Achterbahn is a steel indoor roller coaster located at Plopsaland Deutschland in Hassloch, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany.

Themed to the German media franchise Tabaluga, which park owners Studio 100 also own.
